architecture.summary: Pure client-side: custom React hook with requestAnimationFrame, no external deps, hook at src/app/hooks/useAnimatedNumber.ts, StatCard component inline in QueuePageClient.tsx

integrations.summary: N/A - pure frontend animation, no external services or APIs

ui-ux.summary: 400ms easeOutCubic interpolation, direction arrows (green up, red down) that briefly appear, left border accent for cached data fading to none when live data arrives

performance.summary: rAF-based (no polling), 400ms animation duration, prefers-reduced-motion respected by skipping animation and showing values immediately

security.summary: N/A - UI animation only, no auth/data/permissions concerns

edge-cases.summary: prefers-reduced-motion skip, cached vs live visual distinction via border accent, direction arrows appear briefly then fade
